title: Bulk Prospecting in GoHighLevel — Find 60 Leads Fast
description: Master Bulk Prospecting in GoHighLevel to find 60 leads fast. Learn keyword targeting, duplicate detection, filtering, and how to launch outreach campaigns instantly.
html_content:
Finding 60 qualified leads in minutes sounds impossible—until you see Bulk Prospecting in GoHighLevel in action. Most agencies waste hours copying names from Google Maps into spreadsheets, manually checking for duplicates, and building contact lists one by one. Bulk Prospecting eliminates that friction. With smart keyword and location targeting, automatic duplicate detection, and multi-select saving, you can now discover, evaluate, and add dozens of prospects to your CRM in a single workflow. Whether you're running lead generation for clients or building your own pipeline, this feature is a game-changer. In this guide, I'll walk you through exactly how to leverage it. And if you're ready to experience the full power of GoHighLevel's prospecting engine, start your free 30-day trial here—that's double the standard trial.

📋 In This Guide

  • What Is Bulk Prospecting in GoHighLevel?
  • How to Run Smarter Searches with Keyword and Location Targeting
  • How to Sort, Filter, and Detect Duplicate Leads Automatically
  • Customizing Your Search Layout for Maximum Efficiency
  • Saving Up to 15 Prospects and Launching Outreach Campaigns
  • Why Bulk Prospecting Beats Manual Lead Generation

What Is Bulk Prospecting in GoHighLevel?

Bulk Prospecting is an enhanced search-and-save workflow built into GoHighLevel's Prospecting Tool. It pulls live data directly from Google Maps and lets you surface up to 60 lead results per search. Unlike the manual prospecting approach—where you'd search one keyword, find a few results, and manually copy contact details—Bulk Prospecting streamlines the entire discovery and capture process.

Here's what makes it powerful: higher-volume results, multi-select saving (save up to 15 prospects at once), automatic duplicate detection, and customizable result views. You can sort by rating, review count, or custom criteria. Every prospect you save is automatically added to your Sub-Account CRM as a contact, ready for outreach via email, SMS, or automated workflows.

For marketing agencies, this means you can generate 60 leads per search and provide clients with detailed insights into local competition, customer sentiment, and market opportunity—all without leaving GoHighLevel.

How to Run Smarter Searches with Keyword and Location Targeting

The foundation of successful bulk prospecting is a smarter search strategy. GoHighLevel's Prospecting Tool gives you granular control over what you're looking for and where you're looking.

Keyword Targeting: Start with intent-driven keywords. Instead of just "plumber," search "emergency plumber near me" or "24-hour plumbing services." The more specific your keyword, the more qualified your results. You can also search by business category (e.g., "dental offices," "HVAC contractors") to cast a wider net.

Location Targeting: Define your geography with precision. Enter a specific city, zip code, or use the radius feature to expand your search area. If you're targeting a metro area, you might search a 25-mile radius from a central point. For a smaller town, a 10-mile radius might capture everyone you need. GoHighLevel automatically pulls results from Google Maps that match your parameters.

Combining Both: The magic happens when you layer both. Search "roofing contractors" within a 15-mile radius of "Austin, TX." You'll instantly see up to 60 relevant prospects ranked by Google's algorithm—meaning you get the most visible, reviews-driven businesses first.

💡 Pro Tip

Use hyper-local keywords when targeting niche services. "Luxury pet grooming" will give you better-fit leads than just "pet grooming." Quality beats quantity every time.

How to Sort, Filter, and Detect Duplicate Leads Automatically

Once you've run a search and see your 60 results, the next step is sorting and filtering to find your best prospects. GoHighLevel makes this effortless.

Sorting Options: The default sort is by Google Maps relevance and rating. You can also sort by:

  • Review count (more reviews = more credibility)
  • Star rating (4.5+ stars typically indicates quality service)
  • Recently added to Google Maps (newer businesses might be hungrier for work)

Filtering: Narrow results by minimum star rating, minimum review count, or business type. For example, filter to show only businesses with 50+ reviews and a 4.0+ rating. This instantly removes inactive or low-credibility listings.

Duplicate Detection: Here's where Bulk Prospecting shines. If you've already saved a prospect from a previous search, GoHighLevel automatically flags duplicates when you run a new search. You won't waste time re-adding the same contact. The system uses business name, phone number, and address to identify duplicates with high accuracy.

This is crucial when you're searching multiple keywords or expanding into adjacent service areas. You might search "plumber" and then "emergency plumber" in the same zip code—both searches will return some overlapping results. Duplicate detection saves you from muddying your contact list.

Customizing Your Search Layout for Maximum Efficiency

GoHighLevel lets you customize how results appear on screen, which dramatically speeds up your decision-making and prospect evaluation.

Column Views: Choose which data points display for each prospect. Most agencies show:

  • Business name
  • Phone number
  • Website URL
  • Star rating
  • Review count
  • Address/location
  • Verification status (is the listing claimed/verified?)

List vs. Map View: The default list view is fastest for bulk scanning. You can quickly scan 10–15 prospects and multi-select the ones you want to save. Map view is helpful if you're visualizing geographic spread or confirming location details.

Hide/Show Saved Prospects: Toggle to hide prospects you've already saved. This prevents re-selection and keeps your focus on fresh leads.

The key is to set up your preferred layout once, then reuse it for every search. Most users who prospect regularly have a custom layout they use 99% of the time—it's just personal preference about which data matters most to you.

Saving Up to 15 Prospects and Launching Outreach Campaigns

The workflow is simple: find prospects, select up to 15 at a time, and save them to your CRM in one batch action.

Multi-Select Process: Use the checkboxes next to each prospect. You can hand-pick specific leads or use "Select All" to grab your entire filtered result set, then uncheck the ones you don't want. Once selected, click "Save" or "Add to Campaign."

Adding to Your CRM: Every saved prospect automatically becomes a contact in your Sub-Account CRM. They're tagged with source ("Bulk Prospecting"), search parameters, and save date. This data helps you track which searches produce the best leads over time.

Launching Outreach: Once contacts are saved, you have immediate options:

  • Manual Email: Send a custom email to selected prospects right from the CRM.
  • SMS Campaign: Launch a text message sequence (where phone data is available).
  • Automated Workflow: Trigger a pre-built email or SMS workflow that nurtures prospects over days or weeks.
  • Task Assignment: Assign follow-ups to team members for phone outreach or personalized outreach.

Many agencies save 15 prospects from a Bulk Prospecting search, immediately add them to a nurture workflow (email + SMS), and let automation handle the initial contact. Meanwhile, team members can follow up on the warmest prospects via phone.

Why Bulk Prospecting Beats Manual Lead Generation

Here's the bottom line: manual lead generation—pulling names from Google Maps into Excel, checking duplicates manually, and copying contact info—takes hours per search and introduces human error. Bulk Prospecting solves this at scale.

Time Savings: You can now find, filter, and save 60 leads in 5–10 minutes instead of 2–3 hours. That's a 15x efficiency gain.

Accuracy: Automatic duplicate detection and direct CRM integration eliminate copy-paste errors and contact duplication.

Consistency: Every prospect gets the same treatment—same data capture, same tagging, same workflow entry point.

Scalability: As an agency, you can run multiple searches per day across different keywords, locations, and verticals. One client might need 60 HVAC contractors; another needs 60 dental offices. Bulk Prospecting handles both in minutes.

Client Value: For agencies serving clients, this is a premium service. Your clients see dozens of competitor leads, detailed market insights, and a ready-to-launch outreach strategy—all faster and cheaper than hiring a VA or using a third-party lead database.
